entries.title: AI Dev Briefing — Monday, June 30, 2026
entries.summary: Fable 5 Return Imminent as the Model Wars Enter a New Phase

headlines.title: Fable 5 Return Imminent as the Model Wars Enter a New Phase
headlines.note: The biggest story right now: Anthropic's Fable 5 — their most capable publicly released model — is on the verge of coming back online after a 17 day government ordered suspension.

headlines.title: Fable 5 Status — Day 17 of Suspension
headlines.note: Fable 5 remains offline for general users (consumers, API, Claude Code, international).

headlines.title: GPT-5.6 Preview Goes Live (June 26)
headlines.note: OpenAI began a limited preview of three GPT 5.6 models: Sol (flagship reasoning), Terra (balanced everyday), and Luna (fast/affordable).

headlines.note: Microsoft announced seven in house models under the MAI designation.

headlines.note: Config 2026 — Figma Figma announced Motion at Config 2026, an AI powered animation tool now available in beta.

headlines.note: June 17, 2026 — AWS Summit New York Amazon Bedrock AgentCore's managed harness is now generally available and free beyond underlying resource costs.

headlines.note: June 2026 — Anthropic Managed Agents can now execute tools in sandboxes you control — your own infrastructure or managed providers (Cloudflare, Daytona, Modal, Vercel).

headlines.title: GPT-4.5 Officially Retires — GPT-5.5 Takes Over
headlines.note: June 27, 2026 — OpenAI GPT 4.5 completed its 30 day sunset.

headlines.note: June 2026 — Anthropic + Apple Claude will work through Apple's Foundation Models framework on iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, visionOS 27, and watchOS 27.

headlines.note: June 27, 2026 Qualcomm is in early talks to acquire Tenstorrent for $8 10 billion.

headlines.note: The shift is from writing code to orchestrating AI systems — the people who know how to harness these tools are more valuable, not less.
